description_long: This is a small, single-story bungalow with a distinct East Asian architectural influence, featuring a sweeping, upturned dark-tiled roof and a square footprint. The front facade has a pair of green double doors with red diamond decorations, flanked by a brick-patterned wall and a small stone well to the right. Bamboo plants and large rocks are arranged on the left side, while a stack of firewood and a clay pot sit near the entrance. The rear of the bungalow displays a circular window with a lattice pattern, and the sides are mostly solid with minimal openings, emphasizing privacy. The structure sits on a green base simulating grass, with a tan pathway leading to the entrance. The overall appearance is serene and traditional, suitable for a tranquil urban garden or park setting.
description: A single-story East Asian-style bungalow with a sweeping tiled roof, green double doors, bamboo, and a stone well, set on a grassy base with a pathway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green double doors, bamboo, firewood, and stone well.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the circular lattice window, stone well, and grouped bushes.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear view of the bamboo cluster and minimal wall openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing bamboo in front of the wall and a wooden crate.
attribute_window_arrangement: single circular rear window, no front windows
